previous_campaign_summary: Performance: preconnect/font preload. Admin: skeleton, quick toggle, style counts, search highlight, upload preview metadata, stats bar, shortcuts, aria-labels, fade-in. PWA: install banner, update banner. A11y: html lang, prefers-reduced-motion. Chat: scroll-to-bottom, retry.
theme: Analytics & monitoring, search & discovery, bulk admin tooling, chat enhancements, route-level code splitting, E2E test infrastructure

objective_registry.objective: Web Vitals RUM + admin analytics dashboard
Lazy-load global visual effects to shrink initial bundle

phases.objective: Web Vitals RUM + analytics foundation
phases.user_visible_gain: Real-user performance metrics + admin insight into client performance
phases.before_after: Before: no client metrics. After: LCP/INP/CLS/FCP/TTFB collected, sent to /api/analytics/vitals, aggregated, visible in admin dashboard with rating bars and daily trend.
phases.local_validation: 188 vitest pass; lint clean; build clean
phases.notes: Test fix: replaced vi.spyOn(window, 'addEventListener') with simpler idempotency check due to jsdom property descriptor.

phases.objective: Route-level code splitting for global effects (custom cursor, film grain, scroll progress, GSAP/Lenis)
phases.user_visible_gain: Faster TTI by deferring visual decoration and GSAP setup to a separate chunk
phases.before_after: Before: main index 271.83 kB / 97.89 kB gzip (gsap+lenis+effects synchronous). After: main 247.47 kB / 90.55 kB gzip; GlobalEffects 24.75 kB / 7.46 kB gzip loaded async on idle.
phases.local_validation: 188 vitest pass; lint clean; build clean; chunk size verified
phases.notes: Main bundle dropped 7.34 kB gzip; ScrollProgress/CustomCursor/FilmGrain/GsapGlobalEffects consolidated into lazy GlobalEffects module.

phases.objective: Mobile swipe gestures for gallery + lightbox
phases.scope: Gallery touch handlers + lightbox swipe nav
phases.user_visible_gain: Native mobile feel: swipe to lightbox, swipe between photos, pinch to zoom
phases.before_after: Before: tap-only. After: swipe + pinch on mobile.

phases.objective: Route-level code splitting for admin, editor, compare
phases.user_visible_gain: Faster initial bundle, smaller TTI for first-time visitors
phases.before_after: Before: all routes in one bundle. After: admin/editor/compare lazy-loaded with React.lazy + Suspense.

phases.objective: Mobile swipe gestures for gallery + lightbox
phases.scope: Gallery touch handlers + lightbox swipe nav
phases.user_visible_gain: Native mobile feel: swipe to lightbox, swipe between photos, pinch to zoom
phases.before_after: Before: tap-only. After: swipe + pinch on mobile.

phases.objective: Custom event tracking for booking funnel
phases.user_visible_gain: Funnel analytics: from gallery view to booking submit
phases.before_after: Before: no user flow data. After: each step emits a tracked event with metadata.

phases.objective: System health audit
phases.user_visible_gain: Defect detection + stability verification
phases.before_after: Before: unknown health. After: audit log + any fix commits.

phases.objective: Advanced faceted search for gallery (style + album + date + tag)
phases.user_visible_gain: Faster photo discovery via multi-dimensional filters
phases.before_after: Before: only style filter. After: combined facets with active chip display.

phases.objective: Bulk photo operations: multi-select export (CSV/JSON) + bulk tag
phases.user_visible_gain: Admin can export hundreds of selected photos metadata or apply tag in one action
phases.before_after: Before: one-by-one. After: select-all + export + bulk apply.

phases.objective: Audit log for admin mutations
phases.user_visible_gain: Track who changed what, when, with diff (compliance + debugging)
phases.before_after: Before: no audit trail. After: every photo/preset/course mutation is logged with user + timestamp + diff.

phases.objective: Chat markdown support + message history persistence
phases.scope: Public chat widget markdown rendering + localStorage history
phases.user_visible_gain: Richer chat: bold, lists, code blocks; messages persist across reloads
phases.before_after: Before: plain text, no history. After: markdown + persisted history with clear option.

phases.objective: Related photos algorithm (tags + style + album hybrid)
phases.user_visible_gain: Better photo recommendations on detail page
phases.before_after: Before: album-prioritized (static). After: weighted by tag overlap + style + album proximity.

phases.objective: System health audit
phases.user_visible_gain: Defect detection + stability verification
phases.before_after: Before: unknown health. After: audit log + any fix commits.

phases.objective: Photo moderation queue (featured/hidden review)
phases.user_visible_gain: Admin can review and approve visibility/featured status changes
phases.before_after: Before: direct mutation. After: queue + approve flow.

phases.objective: E2E test infrastructure: Playwright critical user flows
phases.user_visible_gain: Critical flows (browse, lightbox, book, admin login) protected from regressions
phases.before_after: Before: only unit tests. After: E2E suite for top flows with CI integration.

phases.objective: Service worker offline gallery (cache-first with fallback UI)
phases.user_visible_gain: Previously viewed photos work offline; offline page shown for new requests
phases.before_after: Before: full network required. After: cached photos load offline.

phases.objective: Map enhancements: custom markers + clustering + location search
phases.user_visible_gain: Workshop locations are clickable clusters with detail on click; searchable
phases.before_after: Before: bare leaflet markers. After: cluster pins + search box + detail popup.

phases.objective: Lightbox keyboard shortcuts (arrow nav + zoom)
phases.user_visible_gain: Desktop power user: arrow keys to navigate, +/- to zoom
phases.before_after: Before: click only. After: full keyboard control.

phases.objective: System health audit
phases.user_visible_gain: Defect detection + stability verification
phases.before_after: Before: unknown health. After: audit log + any fix commits.

phases.objective: Image gallery virtualization for large sets
phases.user_visible_gain: Gallery scrolls smoothly with 1000+ photos
phases.before_after: Before: full DOM render. After: only visible items + buffer rendered.
